title: xtra savory spanish beef paella
description: traditional valencian paella with beef stock concentrate, a winey, cheesy, and savory hangover cure
instructions: heat a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat
add 2 tablespoons of olive oil and saut2 some onions until translucent
add 1 cup of sliced bell peppers and cook until tender
add 1 cup of sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown
add 1 cup of uncooked Arborio rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly
add 4 cups of beef broth, 2 cups of water, and 2 tablespoons of beef stock concentrate; bring to a boil
reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the liquid has been absorbed and the rice is tender
add 1 cup of grated manchego cheese and stir until melted
serve hot, garnished with lemon wedges
